utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: The format requires each of the first four items to include coverage description and costs. In the plan, each has a plan name and details, but costs are stated as 'Part of the total package' or 'Included in the package,' not explicit costs. Thus, they are not fully specified with costs. The total_budget item does have monthly and annual costs specified. Therefore, only the total_budget item is fully specified according to the requested format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three specific plans by name: EliteCare Premium Plan (Physical and Mental Health), EliteHome Premium Coverage, and EliteTravel Premium Plan. These names match entries in the ground-truth ratings. For health, EliteCare Premium Plan appears in both physical and mental health categories, each with a rating of 10. For property, EliteHome Premium Coverage has a rating of 10. For travel, EliteTravel Premium Plan has a rating of 10. The additional services entry 'ConsultingPro Partner Benefits Integration' does not have a corresponding item in the ground-truth list, so it is not mapped.
